title: The World Reacts Before the Reverie
description: On pages 10–13, this part focuses on Unknown person #9, Unknown person #10, Unknown person #11, Unknown person #12 as News of Whole Cake Island spreads across the world and the story pivots toward the Reverie.
scene: The world learns a distorted version of the Whole Cake Island incident as royal delegations move toward the Reverie.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Now, what are you trash going to do!? Will you die? or will you fight?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Choose your own fate!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Do you think being a hero is someone else's duty?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: The towns- people picked up sticks!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: It could be yours!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hey, hey, don't make me laugh!! Are you planning to fight us!!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: LIND! KARASU! Go to the other side to provide support!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: leave it to us!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: How in the world... Because of her rallying cheers... power is welling up inside me!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Chase the Pirates out of our town!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That's right!! That's the power of Betty's cheer- Cheer fruit!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: With one wave of her flag...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: SHE'S ABLE TO AWAKEN THE LATENT POWER IN EVERY PERSON!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Betty is the flag-bearer of Freedom!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: It seems that they don't realise...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: That getting shot is painful!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Take this!! Cool shooter...!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: It's cold!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: The guns are... being covered in ice!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You bastaards!! Get out of here, you pirate- Eessss!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: gyaka aahh!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: OMOW!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Caw!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: WaaAah!! Give that back!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: The Crows are taking our swords!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Pink- beard...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: He's worth 50 million, eh?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...!! BLACK- BEARD-SAMA... WON'T LET YOU GET AWAY WITH THIS!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Unfortunately- lately for you, he isn't the type of person to care about those serving under his flag.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Hey!! You cowardly, weak and...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Idiotic towns- people!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The 50 million on his head is yours to claim.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Here's the contact information for you to get in touch with the Revolu- Today Army...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: You guys did a good job here...!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You can call us any- time! We won't abandon... weak-lings who want to rise up!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: BE... BELO BETTY-SAMAA AAAAA!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...Hey, hey, everyone, what are we meeting up for this time?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We're going to start a fight with the celestial dragons.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That sounds awesome!! I'm looking forward to it!:)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Time until the Reverie: 2 days...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Oh, and... turn on the loudspeaker, Karasu!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The many variables of this world have begun to move...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: I forgot...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Intense people are gathering...

summary: This section advances the Reverie Setup storyline with 45 dialogue beats. The aftermath becomes world news and the narrative shifts toward the Reverie and global politics.
